reviews.review_description: What is wrong with this game??? My bf and I are unable to load the game for months regardless of where we try to login from. It keeps giving us the ‘no network’ message. It’s frustrating! RETURN ME MY MONEY!!!!!!!!!!!
Great game and very fun

Good game and certainly fun, but for me id like more freedom of movement, and more gesture based casting with the wands im happy with the abilities although more is always more fun and better, enhance the playstyle also with different combinations of spells, i bought the game and the only reasons i dont play are listed above and also the player base…. Cause thats an issue. 


Unfortunatly i think this was a cash cow project cause ive seen  little to no support since purchase

reviews.review_title: [ADVICE FOR DEVS] Great Game, No Players
reviews.review_description:
This game has so much potential. The mechanics are there, the style is there, all it’s missing is a player base, and it’s missing it bad.
*DEVS, IF YOU’RE READING THIS:*
The way to get your players back is to release an update! An exciting one with completely new stuff. People have bought this game, they’re just not currently active. In order to get new buyers, you need a player base, and in order to get a player base, you need to reactivate the one you already have! I would recommend first adding a new roster for  players to choose from (not just two or three, more like a whole six more), and doubling your spell count. Make some characters that are extra unique, like being able to hold three spells on one of their wands. And probably the biggest thing of all, let people duel with it! A duel game mode would be awesome with the new mechanics in Alliances. I’m not saying get rid of the original wands, just add dueling to the new one as well.

I get it, game development is hard, but this game deserves the attention.
Great game but would’ve been more fun if there was a story mode where u unlock powers and wands etc

reviews.review_title: Great for person with motion sickness
reviews.review_description: Thank you for this, there arent many games available for person with motion sickness. This is a must for vr enthusiast with motion sickness.

developer_response.body:
I have the same issue motion sickness when I play free locomotion games but this one I can stay in for hours. Glad that you are enjoying our game and welcome to the Wands family. We appreciate your support and reviews. Hope to see in the game or our Discord 
https://discord.gg/EgX5N5EX

reviews.review_description: I was pretty wary of the teleporting movement in this title, generally I find it immersion breaking and outdated, however in this game it creates a real sense of strategy in taking positions, and using space controlling spells that just couldn't be as effective with normal locomotion, almost like a complex board game. That combined with the excellent integration of room scale dodging and attacking, and this game is easily the most fun mix of combat and strategy I've seen in vr for a while. I sincerely hope that this title gets regular updates and content, since it's a bit limited, especially when it comes to the number of maps, and cosmetics. Overall highly recommended, if you're on the fence, you'll probably be happy if you do decide to purchase wands alliance :)

developer_response.body:
Hi Snowfire37.
Thanks for your review! For a small worked out Indie studio like us your feedback matters a ton. I'll pass on your lovely feedback to the devs. Take care and hope to meet you in the game.

reviews.review_description: I hope they make more games like this

reviews.review_description: This game is honestly the most fun thing I’ve played on my oculus. I can not recommend it enough. For only twenty dollars it is a STEAL with a game this good. It’s got a progression system, multiple characters and spells to choose from, only 3 maps rn but they play so well and the voice chat and controls are superb. If your even debating on getting this game, trust me and do it.

developer_response.body: HuskyAddams42 you make us blush! I just wish we could hire you as a full time promotor of our game. The team is slowly assembling after the summer and there is nothing better to gain energy from than to read reviews like yours. Thank you for the 5 stars and we will try to push as much content out as we can to not let you down. Please join our Discord for more updates on releases and patches.  https://discord.gg/xaepFWB9

reviews.review_description:
So I wanna start off by saying I never got to play the first Wands game so don’t expect me to compare it to that. I had the honor of discovering this game through a post the dev made on Reddit and honestly I’ve never been happier to admit I use that app. I’m still somewhat new to VR and have mostly been playing games like Zenith, Population One, Rec Room, basically most games that stand out amongst others when you first open the store and this game is exactly the kind of game I needed to truly get me into VR. 

Movement: this isn’t like most PvP games here on the VR where you can just freely walk around, but instead you use light posts to teleport to their location and they make it make sense in the way you need light to be able to use magic. 

Spells: I’m still somewhat fresh in the game but OH MY GOSH these spells are so fun. This game doesn’t just start you off with garbage and make you progress to get the actual good stuff. Everything here is viable and SO much fun to play around with to really shape yourself into the wizard you wanna be.

Game mode: Now I haven’t seen if there’s multiple, but the main game mode here is basically Search & Destroy from COD and if you’re like me and that’s your favorite game mode anyway then this is exactly the game you’re wanting. 

One “Con”: Now I say “con” because it doesn’t truly bother me, but the play space. If you’re like me and you don’t have a ton of room to play with in your house then there’s gonna be some points where some things are just too close for comfort for you, but honestly it’s not even a major deal because if you don’t at least have the space to take a step or two back then I could imagine you’re not even playing VR much anyway. Basically just make sure you have a bit of wiggle room to play this game. You’ll need to be able to peak around corners and duck here and there to dodge, so… again, not really a con, more of a warning for those slightly limited on space.

TL;DR: 5 star wizard game. Immediately sucks you in to a world of magic and just make sure you’re not playing in your closet :)

reviews.review_title: Needs be only one player per lantern.
reviews.review_description:
**Updated**changed from 1 to 4 stars**
Ok so I've given it another try and have got a little better about moving around. Still should change it to be only one player per lantern.  Would be nice to see more defensive spells for each character. Will be keeping the game now, excited to see what the story mode has and what new content will be added.




The teleportation travel is absolutely horrible, you barely have time to even more before they are behind you. They allow multiple teammates to be at the same lantern and is easy to team up on one player. They should make it one player per lantern. Story mode doesn't work at all. This will most likely be the FIRST game I've ever got a refund for.

Great way to be active while having fun! My legs have been sore from all the squatting and dodging I've been doing! I love how active it is while also just being fun, I've run down my battery multiple times in a day while playing!

reviews.review_title: Thoughts from a non-shooter game player
reviews.review_description: I didn't realize when I bought this game that it was essentially a 'shooter'.  I was looking more for a Harry Potter-esque world adventure game.  That being said I was blown away by how fun the tutorial was.  It felt so life like and I loved the idea of having all of these different spells to use and practice.  Unfortunately the actual game play just felt like chaos to me so I couldn't really enjoy it.  I would love to have a game like this but focussed on quests that you needed to use different wands to perform.  That would be absolutely incredible.  As it is I really won't play this again.  Kind of disappointed.

developer_response.body:
Hi argoisin!
Sorry to hear you're slightly disappointed. In the trailer for the game and general information, we feel it's reasonably clear Wands Alliances is an high-paced, action-oriented game. If you're struggling to get into the game, try playing custom games until you feel more at home. There you can choose to play against bots, or with or against friends. When you feel more secure, you can return to normal games against live opposition again.
We hope you get back to the game, but regardless, thanks for the review and constructive criticism!

reviews.review_description: Live like Harry Potter! Plus the game has Bots! Get 25% off with this link: shorturl.at/pwDIJ

This game has a lot of potential. It’s fun to customize your 4 spells and dodge with your body. However, for a 3v3 game, I’ve seen 1v1 players or 1v2 and the rest were bots which are useless. This game would be one I keep coming back to if it was 3v3 players. With no single mode, and so many bots to face, it’s kinda meh.. I’ll update to 5 stars if that changes.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words and valid feedback, and sorry for the belated response. This fall we among other things introduced snap turning, launched WA on SteamVR as well as Pivo with full crossplay, and we've launched Team Deathmatch, a whole new game mode. We'll continue to try to boost the player base, and hope to see you returning to the battlefield. :)
